title: Evidence Pack
description: Aggregated portfolio compiling AI systems, vendors, risks, controls, evidence items, and operational events into a single verifiable compliance package.

id.description: Unique identifier of the compiled evidence pack (e.g. pck_1234).

title.description: Descriptive title of the evidence pack (e.g. System Q1 2026 Audit Pack).

description.description: Summary context or audit goal of this compilation.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this evidence pack was compiled.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this evidence pack was last modified.

ai_systems.description: AI systems compiled within this pack.

risks.description: Risk register entries compiled for the target systems.

controls.description: Active operational and technical controls mapped in the pack.

evidence_items.description: Scan logs, test cases, and telemetry validating the active controls.

agent_runs.description: Telemetry logs recording autonomous agent actions.

vendor_changes.description: Audit trail log mapping vendor privacy or API changes.

regulation_changes.description: Upstream regulatory framework updates recorded in the pack.

incident_mappings.description: Operational failure files mapped to mitigation controls.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
